heading: “State” defined
label: 21141 “State” defined
text: In this chapter, the term “State” includes the District of Columbia, the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, Guam, American Samoa, and the United States Virgin Islands.
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , , known as the Help America Vote Act of 2002, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 107–252116 Stat. 1666Oct. 29, 2002
